name: ZonZon
short_description: The main character is a journalist who arrived at a large warehouse to record a documentary about the warehouse operation. But instead, he is faced with a real nightmare. The warehouse turns out to be populated by hungry guards and crazy warehouse operators who turn it into a death trap.
detailed_description:
The main character is a journalist who arrived at a large warehouse to record a documentary about the warehouse operation. But instead, he is faced with a real nightmare. The warehouse turns out to be populated by hungry guards and crazy warehouse operators who turn it into a death trap. The journalist will have to try very hard to survive in this hell, uncover the secret of the warehouse and get out.
The player will have to explore the warehouse, solve puzzles and escape from monsters. The game will keep the player in suspense from start to finish.

Features of the game

  • Atmosphere of horror: A gloomy warehouse filled with insane employees creates an atmosphere of horror and tension.
  • A variety of enemies: hungry guards and their superiors will monitor the player's actions and try to catch him.
  • Mysticism and riddles: the player will have to find a way out of confusing situations in order to advance through the plot and uncover the secrets of the warehouse.
  • Hopelessness: the player will have only a camera and a flashlight at his disposal.
  • Freedom of movement: the player can freely explore the warehouse and meet new employees, as well as find Easter eggs.
  • Backstage: Maybe you'll get lucky and find the Backstage of a warehouse where many employees have disappeared.

Are you ready for a fulfillment adventure?
